author: doll-agent
content:
Done. The existing fit_weighted test used uniform [1,1,1,1,1] weights - same code path as unweighted fit. Added 4 tests where weighting drives the solution:

- fit_weighted_outlier_suppression: leverage outlier at x=4 skews uniform slope by >5x; setting w[4] = 1e-9 recovers y = 2x + 1 within 1e-3.
- fit_weighted_zero_weight_excludes_point: w[i] = 0 yields identical coefficients to dropping the point entirely.
- fit_weighted_scaling_invariance: multiplying weights by 7.5 yields bit-identical (1e-9) coefficients.
- fit_weighted_emphasizes_specific_point: w[0] = 1e6 pins fit through that point.

ferray-polynomial: 174 -> 178 lib tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit 49429222.
